summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive refs were hydrated, and close/fix/merge paths are disabled by the job permissions. Useful focused PRs with maintainer/technical-review gates are surfaced as item-scoped needs_human; conflicted or review-blocked PowerShell follow-ups are kept open as related work.

actions.reason: Already-closed linked context ref; no mutation planned.
Keep the issue open while the linked candidate PR remains under review.
Keep the issue open while the linked PR owns validation.
Focused P1 message-delivery fix with green checks and an unresolved technical correctness/review-proof decision; merge/fix actions are disabled for this job.
Focused green contributor fix is ready for maintainer technical review, but this worker cannot merge or repair it.
Maintainer-owned draft with broad QA surface; leave to maintainer judgment.
Focused UI message-state fix needs maintainer technical/proof judgment before any merge path.
Useful related docs-tooling PR remains open, but it is blocked by conflicts, failing proof/checks, and unresolved bot review comments.
Related follow-up PR should stay open until review comments and failed proof are addressed.
